---
title: "The Rev. Henry Albany Bowles sr."
---

## The Rev. Henry Albany Bowles sr.

**Dates:** (1819-25 June 1898)

### Description

father of the Rev. Henry Bowles

### Biography

He was ordained in 1843 and was Rector of Merrow, Guildford; he married (1856) Caroline (d. 21 Feb 1896), dau of Robert Barlow of Holybourne, Hants  [LG 1906 Bowles]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 17th [1897]
- Letter from May 3d [1897]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
